## v1.0.12 — Setup Hub install hotfixes

### Critical fixes
- **pip-deps chain** — removed invalid `opensora` PyPI line; torch installs via CUDA index (CPU fallback); Open-Sora via `pip install -e`; optional packages (xformers, etc.) fail softly
- **Windows embed venv** — `virtualenv` fallback when `python -m venv` fails on embed builds; `_pth` enables site-packages
- **WSL bootstrap** — script copied to AppData cache and unpacked from asar; safer bash quoting; torch + editable Open-Sora in WSL script

### Setup Hub UX
- **Git** no longer blocks full install batch — opens Git for Windows installer link instead
- **Auto-update loop** — manual Install/Update all skips re-triggering auto-update on rescan
- **Managed Open-Sora path** read-only when force-managed; models README no longer counts as installed weights

### CI / smoke
- Platform-aware `getVenvPythonPath` test (fixes Linux CI)
- `smoke:desktop` passes managed `userDataPath` for accurate force-managed scan

Existing installs should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
